items.title: Reschedule call with Elizabeth Hoyt
items.summary: Elizabeth Hoyt from 2 Market Media needs to reschedule today's call due to travel delays. Dr. Haas said he'd work with EA to find Friday availability.
items.actionNeeded: Coordinate with EA to schedule Friday meeting with Elizabeth Hoyt.

items.title: SSRP Phoenix hotel confirmation update

items.title: PWC travel coordination for Ryan and Brittany
items.summary: Dr. Haas asked Yanina to coordinate hotels and flights to PWC for Ryan and Brittany on the Infusive team. Darren and Lauren's rooms will be kept.
items.actionNeeded: Ensure Yanina coordinates travel arrangements for Ryan and Brittany to PWC.
